job_title: Senior Software Engineer Full Stack - jobs at Intuit
subject: Interested in Senior Software Engineer Full Stack - jobs at Intuit at Intuit
body:
Hi Alexandria,

I recently came across the Senior Software Engineer Full Stack - jobs at Intuit role at Intuit and wanted to reach out directly. With 3 years of experience in Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, React, Node.js, I believe I'd be a strong fit.

I recently built AI Job Hunter Agent — Multi-agent system that autonomously searches jobs, finds recruiters, and queues applications. I'd love to bring this kind of initiative to Intuit.

Would you be open to a brief chat about the role? I'd love to learn more about what the team is working on.

Best regards,
Rithvik Mysore Suresh

I recently came across the Reacher hiring Full Stack Engineer in Vancouver, British ... - LinkedIn role at LinkedIn and wanted to reach out directly. With 3 years of experience in Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, React, Node.js, I believe I'd be a strong fit.

I recently built AI Job Hunter Agent — Multi-agent system that autonomously searches jobs, finds recruiters, and queues applications. I'd love to bring this kind of initiative to LinkedIn.

Would you be open to a brief chat about the role? I'd love to learn more about what the team is working on.

Best regards,
Rithvik Mysore Suresh
